title: myrrhis australis
intro: Myrrhis australis, also known as sweet cicely, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a digestive aid and to alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Myrrhis australis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
